courses.name: B.Tech Computer Science
courses.description: Covers software engineering, AI/ML, data science, and cloud computing.

courses.name: B.Tech Information Technology
courses.description: Focus on networking, cybersecurity, web technologies, and enterprise systems.

courses.name: BCA (Bachelor of Computer Applications)
courses.description: Industry-focused program with web development and mobile apps specialization.

courses.name: MCA (Master of Computer Applications)
courses.description: Advanced computing with research and industry project focus.

courses.name: MBA (Master of Business Administration)
courses.description: Finance, Marketing, HR, and IT specializations with industry integration.

courses.name: B.Sc. Data Science
courses.description: Data analytics, machine learning, and business intelligence program.

scholarships.name: Sports Excellence Award
scholarships.criteria: State or National level sports achievement

hostel.note: First come first served. Apply at admission office.

admissionProcess: Fill online application form at abccollege.edu.in
Upload required documents (marksheets, ID proof, photo)
Merit list published within 7 working days
Pay admission fee to confirm your seat

faqs.question: Is there any entrance exam?
faqs.answer: No entrance exam required. Admission is merit-based on 12th board marks. MBA requires CAT/MAT/CMAT score.

faqs.question: Can I pay fees in installments?
faqs.answer: Yes! Fees can be paid in 2 installments per semester. Education loans are also facilitated through our finance cell.

faqs.question: Is the college affiliated to a university?
faqs.answer: Yes, we are affiliated to Mumbai University and approved by AICTE and UGC.

faqs.question: Can I visit campus before admission?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! Campus visits are available Monday–Saturday, 10 AM to 4 PM. Call +91-9876543210 to schedule.

faqs.question: What are the library facilities?
faqs.answer: Our library has 50,000+ books, e-library access, 24x7 reading room, and subscriptions to IEEE, Springer, and Elsevier journals.

faqs.question: Is there a placement guarantee?
faqs.answer: We have 94% placement rate. Our dedicated placement cell works with 87+ companies. Top package this year was 32 LPA from Google.

faqs.question: What is the application fee?
faqs.answer: The application fee is ₹500, payable online. This is non-refundable.

faqs.question: Do you provide education loans?
faqs.answer: Yes, we have tie-ups with SBI, HDFC, and Axis Bank for education loans. Our finance cell will guide you through the process.

theme.welcomeMessage:
Hi! 👋 I'm EduBot, your Admission Assistant for ABC College.

I can answer your questions about courses, fees, scholarships, hostel, placements, and more. How can I help you today?
theme.offlineMessage: Our office is currently closed. Please call +91-9876543210 or email admissions@abccollege.edu.in. We'll respond within 24 hours.
